responseTime.question: What is your response time?
responseTime.answer: We commit to responding within 24 business hours. For production emergencies, a dedicated number is provided to clients under contract.

firstMeeting.question: Is the first meeting paid?
firstMeeting.answer: No. The first 30 minutes are free and commitment-free. They allow us to understand your challenges and assess whether our expertise is the right fit.

location.question: Do you only work in Paris?
location.answer: We work 100% remotely for clients in France and internationally. In-person meetings are possible in Paris and the surrounding area.

technologies.question: What technologies do you work with?
technologies.answer: Laravel 12, React/Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, AWS. We always choose the technology best suited to the problem at hand.

metadata.title: Contact — Let's Talk About Your Technical Project
metadata.description: Schedule a free 30-minute call with RL Conseil. Fractional CTO, SaaS architecture, HDS/eIDAS/Factur-X compliance. Response within 24h.

hero.description: From founding a digital agency in Jerusalem to leading information systems in Paris, each step reinforced one conviction: technology is a business accelerator, not an end in itself.

metadata.title: Journey — 15 Years of Technical Leadership & Entrepreneurship

cv.profileText: CTO and founder of RL Conseil, 15 years of experience in technical leadership and application development. Expert in French regulatory compliance (HDS, eIDAS, GDPR, Factur-X). International background (France, Israel) combining business vision and technical excellence. 50+ applications delivered in production, 99.9% uptime on critical platforms.

scell.description: B2B API infrastructure that automates the generation of electronic invoices in Factur-X format and eIDAS-certified electronic signatures. Designed to integrate within hours into any existing information system.

apillmcontext.name: ApiLLMContext
apillmcontext.subtitle: Give your LLMs the context they deserve.
apillmcontext.description: An MCP server that enriches Claude and other language models with structured external context. Enables AI to understand your codebase, documentation, and business data in real time.

claudenest.subtitle: Orchestrate Claude Code like a team of developers.
claudenest.description: An orchestration platform that enables remote control of Claude Code with multi-agent management, real-time task tracking, and full session history.

praticonnect.subtitle: The 100% digital practice management suite for wellness professionals.
praticonnect.description: An all-in-one platform for wellness professionals: appointment booking, video teleconsultation, administrative management, and patient follow-up.

noteflow.name: NoteFlow
noteflow.subtitle: Your notes think with you.
noteflow.description: A productivity app combining note-taking, task management, and artificial intelligence. The AI analyzes your notes to suggest actions and connections between your ideas.

dailyCompanion.name: Daily Companion
dailyCompanion.subtitle: Your personal journal, enhanced by AI.
dailyCompanion.description: An intelligent personal journal with Étoile, a caring AI companion. Emotional trend analysis, reflection prompts, and wellness tracking.

gigapdf.name: GigaPDF
gigapdf.subtitle: The open source PDF editor the market was missing.
gigapdf.description: A complete open source PDF editing suite with real-time collaboration. Annotation, merging, conversion, signing — without sending your documents to a third-party server.

ordoconnect.name: OrdoConnect
ordoconnect.subtitle: The health platform that respects your patient data.
ordoconnect.description: A management platform for healthcare professionals with HDS-certified hosting. Patient records, digital prescriptions, and secure messaging.

timeismoney.name: TimeIsMoney
timeismoney.subtitle: Invoice accurately. Invoice compliantly. Invoice fast.
timeismoney.description: NF525-certified invoicing solution with time tracking, automatic invoice generation, and direct accounting integration.

gigaCrm.name: Giga-CRM
gigaCrm.subtitle: The CRM that automates what your sales team forgets.
gigaCrm.description: A modular AI-powered CRM and ERP. Predictive lead scoring, automated follow-ups, and customizable dashboards.

claudeDcm.name: Claude-DCM
claudeDcm.subtitle: Persistent memory and multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code.
claudeDcm.description: Open source Distributed Context Manager: a persistence and orchestration layer for Claude Code sessions. REST API with 86+ endpoints, 11-page real-time dashboard with 3D visualization, safety gate against destructive operations, and multi-agent coordination via WebSocket and PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY.

marieL.text: RL Conseil turned our specification document into an HDS-certified platform in four months. What impressed me most was Rony's ability to understand the constraints of the healthcare sector without needing them explained twice.
marieL.name: Dr. Marie L.
marieL.title: Director, Medical Group

thomasR.text: After two disappointing experiences with agencies, working with RL Conseil was a relief. Clean code, deadlines met, and above all, a real technical vision that anticipates our needs 18 months out.
thomasR.name: Thomas R.
thomasR.title: CEO, B2B SaaS Startup

sophieM.text: The e-invoicing compliance was causing us a lot of anxiety. Rony took ownership of the issue with a calm confidence that immediately put us at ease. The investment paid for itself within six months.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: Unless otherwise agreed, source code developed under the engagement is transferred to the client upon receipt of full payment.
